message:
feat(e2e): Add TestTerminal framework for end-to-end testing

Add e2e-tests package with:
- TestTerminal framework for spawning and interacting with examples
- Key input simulation (arrows, enter, escape, ctrl+c, etc.)
- Output capture and assertion helpers
- Timeout-based wait_for pattern

Tests added (marked #[ignore] for CI):
- Basic examples: counter, spinner, textinput (11 tests)
- Intermediate examples: todo-list, viewport, progress (14 tests)

Run with: cargo test -p e2e-tests -- --ignored

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+[package]
+name = "e2e-tests"
+description = "End-to-end integration tests for charmed_rust examples"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+rust-version.workspace = true
+license.workspace = true
+publish.workspace = true
+
+[dependencies]
+anyhow.workspace = true
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+# Test utilities
+tempfile = "3"
